codes.description: Path or local artifact input violates frozen repository-relative or bundle-root policy.
codes.title: INPUT_INVALID

codes.description: Artifact schema does not match the required frozen schema.
codes.title: SCHEMA_MISMATCH

codes.description: Artifact payload or integrity subject violates frozen grammar or validation rules.
codes.title: ARTIFACT_INVALID

codes.description: Canonical hash or binding-field recomputation mismatches the recorded values.
codes.title: CROSS_ARTIFACT_HASH_MISMATCH

codes.description: Deployment-mode or standalone-only policy constraints were violated.
codes.title: DEPLOYMENT_MODE_POLICY_VIOLATION

codes.description: Standalone integrity verification contract or emitted-file inventory constraints were violated.
codes.title: INTEGRITY_POLICY_VIOLATION

codes.description: Current standalone packaging output could not be materialized in the current v54 flow.
codes.title: PACKAGING_MATERIALIZATION_FAILED

codes.description: Standalone integrity verification result artifact is missing, drifted, or otherwise invalid.
codes.title: RESULT_INVALID

codes.description: Standalone integrity diagnostic registry contract is missing or invalid.
codes.title: CONTRACT_REGISTRY_INVALID
